condition.description: Defines a set of conditions that must be met for the IAM binding to apply, specified as an expression, title, and description.

members.description: List of members to be granted the specified role, defined as email addresses or identifiers.

org_id.description: The ID of the organization where the IAM binding will be applied. Must be a valid organization ID.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to apply to the members within the organization. Must be in the format roles/{ROLE_NAME}.
